kicker: PT LEVEL II // INDICATIONS FROM CRACKS

beats.narration: A crack indication is a confession. Read three things and the crack tells you which stage of life broke it.

payload.title: EVERY CRACK CONFESSES
payload.sub: Location, orientation, shape — read all three.

beats.narration: Three clues do the work. Where the line sits, which way it runs, and what shape it draws. Together they place the origin.
The answers file the crack into one of three life stages. Solidification tears hot metal, processing leaves a tool signature, service grows the quiet ones.
Each stage signs its work. Ragged hot tears while freezing. Deep quench cracks after heat treat. Sharp fatigue and branched stress-corrosion in service.
And the trap: the deadliest cracks bleed the faintest. So never wipe a faint line away — verify it before you let it go.

payload.sub: Origin guides the fix — but every crack rejects.
